signals.npcLine: Market's bleeding, trust scarce—watch your credits.
signals.questPulse: Shadow traders scramble as cryptos crumble.
signals.worldFeed: Mass selloffs ripple; fear grips the grid.
signals.clueEvent: Data leak hints at major vault breach.

signals.npcLine: RAVE's quiet, but watch those asteroids incoming.
signals.questPulse: Suspicious spikes near zero-day cryptos detected.
signals.worldFeed: Algorithmic bots hunting weak coins in the void.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter about a falling star token.

signals.npcLine: Rumors say AAVE code might be backdoored.
signals.clueEvent: Leaked fragments hint at creeping vulnerabilities.

signals.npcLine: Seek out PENGU—icy trails hiding hot secrets.
signals.questPulse: Encrypted packages await on frozen grid sectors.
signals.worldFeed: Pengu movements disturb the icy blockchain nodes.
signals.clueEvent: Cold chain artifacts surface near corporate zones.

signals.npcLine: ZRO holdings are shaky; whispers of wipeouts loom.
signals.questPulse: ZRO token holders brace for black market raids.
signals.worldFeed: Undercity traders dump volatile assets under cover.
signals.clueEvent: Silent deletion logs found in darknet vaults.
